query:
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
                'type', 'Feature',
                'id', id,
                'geometry', ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326))::jsonb,
                'properties', properties || jsonb_build_object('name', name)
            ) as feature
            FROM app.features
            WHERE collection_id = $1 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
            ORDER BY id
            LIMIT $2
